summary: Completed testing of Cloléo e-commerce platform after chat fix. Backend APIs 100% pass rate (25/25 tests). Chat system fix verified - messages now send correctly via POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages. Frontend UI working correctly with products, categories, cart, and floating chat bubble.
critical_code_review_comments: Chat fix confirmed working - endpoint changed from /api/messages to /api/conversations/{id}/messages
WebSocket message type handling updated to accept both 'message' and 'new_message' types
FloatingChat component properly integrated with ChatProvider context
Backend routes partially modularized in /app/backend/routes/ but server.py still contains all original routes
seed_data_creation: Test customer account created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat system fully functional. All core e-commerce features tested and working: products listing, categories, cart, favorites, chat. Stripe payment integration is MOCKED.

Chat System.Floating Chat Bubble: Working - visible on all pages when logged in
Chat System.Chat Window: Working - opens from bubble, shows messages, allows sending

Products.Product filtering: Working - by category, price, condition, location

Categories.Category page: Working - shows products filtered by category

Cart.Cart UI: Working - shows items, quantities, totals, checkout button

mocked_integrations.Stripe: Payment checkout is MOCKED - uses sk_test_emergent key

screenshots_taken: product_detail.png - Product detail page with chat button
cart_page.png - Cart with item and checkout
